body:
I have fixed the link, also I have attached the file.
Ayman

2008/7/15 Hila Shmuel <>:
> היי,
> יש לי בעיה עם עם הורדת הקובץ טסט לhomework 6, זה אומר שהכתובת של הקובץ לא
> חוקית.
>
> Thanks,
> Hila שמואל.
>
explanation: The provided assembly code outlines the logic for a Tetris game, allowing user input to move and rotate blocks as they fall from the top of the screen. It handles various game operations such as checking for filled lines, removing completed lines, and managing the game state including collision detection and scoring. The assembly code also includes algorithms for drawing the game elements to the screen, initializing the game state, and processing the game loop until the player loses.
subject: Re: Problem in Test File HW 6
summary: This project implements a simple version of the game Tetris, where players can manipulate falling blocks (or 'bricks') to create complete lines. The gameplay involves hitting bricks and managing their positions to score points.
